Talent Module

Select an operation from the sidebar to view its complete SOAP payload with version-specific field filtering.

Press / to search across 123 operations  ·  52 Read  ·  71 Write

All SOAP operations use HTTP POST — "Read" and "Write" indicate the Workday operation category, not the HTTP method.

Version map sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0 via recursive type-tree diff

🔴 SOAP Envelope Faults — 3 faults returned by ALL operations ▶

These 3 faults are defined in the Workday WSDL and can be returned by any operation. They are standard SOAP envelope-level errors — not operation-specific. All return HTTP 500 with a <soapenv:Fault> wrapper.

Fault When It Occurs faultcode
Authentication_Fault Invalid credentials, ISU disabled, missing <wsse:Security> header, or expired token soapenv:Client
Validation_Fault Invalid data in the request — bad WID/Reference_ID, missing required field, date range error, enumeration mismatch, business rule violation soapenv:Client
Processing_Fault Workday server error — business process lock, tenant configuration issue, system limit exceeded, or transient internal error soapenv:Server
Response format (all 3 faults):
<soapenv:Fault>
  <faultcode>soapenv:Client</faultcode>
  <faultstring>Validation error occurred.</faultstring>
  <detail>
    <wd:Workday_Common_Header>
      <wd:Validation_Fault>
        <wd:Message>The value 'X' is not valid ...</wd:Message>
      </wd:Validation_Fault>
    </wd:Workday_Common_Header>
  </detail>
</soapenv:Fault>

ⓘ Workday always returns HTTP 500 for SOAP faults regardless of fault type. Parse <faultcode> and <detail> to distinguish the error.

Get_Assess_Talent

Read Talent • v46.0 16 validations 1KB req / 3KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
16Validations
8Request Fields
29Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Retrieves the Potential Assessment information for Employees.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   performanceEnablement v5
/values/cascadeGoal/talentPools/[performanceEnablement v5]GET

📖 Description

Public web service for retrieving calibration events, relevant workers, and their calibration values.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

📖 Description

Web Service task to export all Close Mentorship Reasons from the tenant.

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   talentManagement v2
/mentorships[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}/edit[talentManagement v2]POSTEdit the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForMe[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship for the current processing worker where the user is also the mentee.
/mentorships/{ID}/close[talentManagement v2]POSTCloses the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForWorker[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship between two workers.

IDA Degree exists with the same Degree ID.A Degree exists with the same Degree ID.API Docs
NameName is required.Include a non-empty value for "Name" in the request.API Docs
NameYou either have a duplicate degree for one or more countries or you are trying to restrict a degree that is available for all countries and already in use. If you have a duplicate degree, remove, merge, or inactivate the extra degrees. If you need to restrict a degree that is in use, inactivate the current degree and create a copy of it with the necessary restrictions.This entry already exists. Check for duplicates before submitting.API Docs
Restricted_to_Countries_ReferenceYou are trying to restrict a degree that is available for all countries and already in use. If you need to restrict a degree that is in use, inactivate the current degree and create a copy of it with the necessary restrictions.The record is currently in use. Complete or cancel any active process referencing it before making changes.API Docs
Restricted_to_Countries_ReferenceYou cannot remove any countries from the Restricted to Countries field for the [degree] degree because it is already in use.You cannot remove any countries from the Restricted to Countries field for the [degree] degree because it is already in use.API Docs

Read Talent • v46.0 10 validations 1KB req / 2KB resp

📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
10Validations
0Request Fields
8Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Get the Mentor options.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   talentManagement v2
/mentorships[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}/edit[talentManagement v2]POSTEdit the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForMe[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship for the current processing worker where the user is also the mentee.
/mentorships/{ID}/close[talentManagement v2]POSTCloses the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForWorker[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship between two workers.

The other Comparison Values like Filter Boolean, Filter Date, Filter Number, Filter Text, Filter Time, Filter DateTimeZone, and Target CRF Reference must be empty.Remove duplicates — only one "the Target Instance References element" is allowed per request.API Docs
Operation_LevelThe Target External Field Reference element is required for this Condition Item.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Operation_LevelThe Target Instance Reference element is required for this Condition Item.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Operation_LevelOnly the Filter Time attribute is a Comparison Value for this Condition Item. The other Comparison Values like Filter Date, Filter Number, Filter Text, Filter DateTimeZone, Target CRF Reference, and Target Instance References must be empty.Provide a valid date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ).API Docs
Operation_LevelOnly the Filter DateTimeZone is a Comparison Value for this Condition Item. The other Comparison Values like Filter Date, Filter Number, Filter Text, Filter Time, Target CRF Reference, and Target Instance References must be empty.Provide a valid date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ).API Docs

Operation_LevelA language profile ability is required.Include a non-empty value for "A language profile ability" in the request.API Docs
Operation_LevelDuplicate language entries are not allowed.This entry already exists. Check for duplicates before submitting.API Docs
Language_Ability_Profile_DataTypeSelect a different Language Ability Type; this one is already in use for the language.Select a different Language Ability Type; this one is already in use for the language.API Docs
Education_Qualification_ReplacementTypeIf Delete is Yes, do not send any qualifications in the Education Qualification Replacement Data element. All education data will be deleted for the Job Profile or Position Restriction.If Delete is Yes, do not send any qualifications in the Education Qualification Replacement Data element. All education data will be deleted for the Job Profile or Position Restriction.API Docs
Responsibility_Qualification_ReplacementTypeIf Delete is yes, do not send any qualifications in the Responsibility Qualification Replacement Data element. All responsibilities will be deleted for the Position Restriction or Job Profile.If Delete is yes, do not send any qualifications in the Responsibility Qualification Replacement Data element. All responsibilities will be deleted for the Position Restriction or Job Profile.API Docs

Get_Succession_Plans

Read Talent • v46.0 19 validations 1KB req / 3KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
19Validations
9Request Fields
25Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Retrieves information about succession plans for the specified positions. Secured to the Worker Data: Succession domain in the Talent Pipeline functional area.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   talentManagement v2
/successionPlans[talentManagement v2]GETPOSTGet succession plans.
/successionPlans/{ID}[talentManagement v2]GETGet succession plans
/values/successionPlan/strategies/[talentManagement v2]GET
/successionPlanEvents[talentManagement v2]GETPOSTGet Succession Plan Events
/successionPlanEvents/{ID}[talentManagement v2]GETGet Succession Plan Events
/values/successionPlan/members/[talentManagement v2]GET
/successionPlanEvents/{ID}/submit[talentManagement v2]POSTSubmits a succession plan event.
/values/successionPlan/readiness/[talentManagement v2]GET
/successionPlanEvents/{ID}/candidates[talentManagement v2]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of information for succession plan candidates for a succession plan…
/successionPlanEvents/{ID}/candidates/{subresourceID}[talentManagement v2]DELETEGETPATCHRetrieves succession plan candidates for the specified succession plan Event ID.

External_Skill_Mapping_Data / DeleteInvalid boolean value for 'Delete'.Value is not 'true' or 'false' (case-sensitive in strict XML).type=xsd:boolean (XSD boolean primitive)[COMMENT] Use lowercase 'true' or 'false'. Workday also accepts '1' (true) and '0' (false) for xs:boolean.

Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation allows adding new anytime feedback for a worker.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   performanceEnablement v5
/feedbackBadges[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of active Feedback Badges.
/feedbackBadges/{ID}[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a Feedback Badge with the specified ID.
/giveRequestedFeedbackEvents[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of feedback given events about the user that responded to the feedb…
/giveRequestedFeedbackEvents/{ID}[performanceEnablement v5]GETPATCHRetrieves a single requested feedback given event instance with the specified ID of the us…
/workers/{ID}/anytimeFeedbackEvents[performanceEnablement v5]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of feedback given events about the specified worker.
/values/feedbackTemplate/feedbackTemplate/[performanceEnablement v5]GET
/values/feedbackOnWorker/feedbackOnWorker/[performanceEnablement v5]GET
/workers/{ID}/requestedFeedbackOnSelfEvents[performanceEnablement v5]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of self-requested feedback events for the specified worker.
/values/feedbackResponder/feedbackResponder/[performanceEnablement v5]GET
/workers/{ID}/requestedFeedbackOnWorkerEvents[performanceEnablement v5]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of requested feedback events for the specified worker.

21 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Give_Feedback_DataWorker giving the feedback cannot be the same as the worker receiving the feedback.Ensure "Worker giving the feedback" is not "the same as the worker receiving the feedback" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
Give_Feedback_DataYour feedback can’t be both Confidential and Private. Select Y for 1 or N for both.Your feedback can’t be both Confidential and Private. Select Y for 1 or N for both.API Docs
Give_Feedback_DataThe Feedback Given Date cannot be in the future.Set "The Feedback Given Date" to today's date or earlier (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD).API Docs
Give_Feedback_DataFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be anonymous, i.e., Show Name must = Y.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Give_Feedback_DataFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be private.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Give_Feedback_DataFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be confidential.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard on Exit Validation ErrorA validation error occurred when exiting the transaction. Review all fields in the request for required values and valid references before resubmitting.API Docs
Business_Process_Attachment_DataThis Business Process Type has been configured to not accept Event Attachments.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment. Please remove the comment or change the setting in the Business Process Policy or tenant setup.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Event_Attachment_Category_ReferenceThis Business Process Type has been configured to not accept Attachment Categories.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Badge_ReferenceFeedback Badges are disabled, cannot include Feedback Badges in feedback.Feedback Badges are disabled, cannot include Feedback Badges in feedback.API Docs
Badge_ReferenceYou can't load an inactive badge.You can't load an inactive badge.API Docs
Show_NameYour tenant has disabled anonymity for anytime feedback. Showing the name of the responder is required.Include a non-empty value for "Your tenant has disabled anonymity for anytime feedback. Showing the name of the responder" in the request.API Docs
ConfidentialThe ability to submit confidential feedback has been disabled by your administrator.If the administrator has disabled confidentiality for Give Feedback, then this validation will prevent users from submitting this field.The ability to submit confidential feedback has been disabled by your administrator.API Docs
PrivateThe ability to submit private feedback has been disabled by your administrator.If the administrator has disabled the private option for Give Feedback, then this validation will prevent users from submitting this field.The ability to submit private feedback has been disabled by your administrator.API Docs
Operation_LevelWorker giving the feedback cannot be the same as the worker receiving the feedback.Ensure "Worker giving the feedback" is not "the same as the worker receiving the feedback" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
Operation_LevelYour feedback can’t be both Confidential and Private. Select Y for 1 or N for both.Your feedback can’t be both Confidential and Private. Select Y for 1 or N for both.API Docs
Operation_LevelThe Feedback Given Date cannot be in the future.Set "The Feedback Given Date" to today's date or earlier (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD).API Docs
Operation_LevelFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be anonymous, i.e., Show Name must = Y.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Operation_LevelFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be private.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Operation_LevelFeedback given to multiple recipients cannot be confidential.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs

Import_Calibration_Values_RequestTypeThis calibration process has an in progress background job or pending business process step. View the calibration event to review its current status.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Import_Calibration_Values_RequestTypeTo update calibration values, the calibration event must be in progress or completed. See the consolidated report for further details.To update calibration values, the calibration event must be in progress or completed. See the consolidated report for further details.API Docs
Import_Calibration_Values_RequestTypeCannot update completed calibration events with no value in Update Completed Calibration column.Cannot update completed calibration events with no value in Update Completed Calibration column.API Docs
Worker_Calibration_DataValidation error occurred. To upload calibration values, the calibration event for the worker must be in progress or completed. The following line has an event that is rescinded: ([instance ID], [worker name])Validation error occurred. To upload calibration values, the calibration event for the worker must be in progress or completed. The following line has an event that is rescinded: ([instance ID], [worker name])API Docs
Worker_ReferenceTo import calibration values, you must have the security to edit the worker calibration event.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Worker_ReferenceThe worker must exist in the calibration event.The worker must exist in the calibration event.API Docs
Calibration_Value_DataBoth the Calibration Row Value and Calibration Column Value must be entered or left blank.Both the Calibration Row Value and Calibration Column Value must be entered or left blank.API Docs
Operation_LevelValidation error occurred. To upload calibration values, the calibration event for the worker must be in progress or completed. The following line has an event that is rescinded: ([instance ID], [worker name])Validation error occurred. Calibration_Row_Value_ReferenceThe Calibration Row Value must be valid as defined by the calibration program.Verify the Reference ID exists in Workday and use the correct type and value.API Docs
Calibration_Column_Value_ReferenceThe Calibration Column Value must be valid as defined by the calibration program.Verify the Reference ID exists in Workday and use the correct type and value.API Docs
Operation_LevelBoth the Calibration Row Value and Calibration Column Value must be entered or left blank.Both the Calibration Row Value and Calibration Column Value must be entered or left blank.API Docs

External_Skill_Source_Data / External_Skill_Source / External_Skill_ReferenceRequired element 'External_Skill_Reference' is missing.The 'External_Skill_Reference' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:External_Skill_Reference>...</bsvc:External_Skill_Reference> in your SOAP request. This element is mandatory per the XSD schema.
External_Skill_Source_Data / External_Skill_Source / External_Skill_ReferenceInvalid or not-found reference for 'External_Skill_Reference'.The ID value supplied in 'External_Skill_Reference' does not match any active record of type 'External_SkillObjectType' in the tenant.type=wd:External_SkillObjectType (Workday ObjectType — reference lookup)[COMMENT] Verify the reference ID exists by running the corresponding Get_ operation first. Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="External_Skill_ID").
External_Skill_Source_Data / External_Skill_Source / Externally_Calculated / Normalized_Skill_LevelRequired element 'Normalized_Skill_Level' is missing.The 'Normalized_Skill_Level' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:Normalized_Skill_Level>...</bsvc:Normalized_Skill_Level> in your SOAP request. This element is mandatory per the XSD schema.
External_Skill_Source_Data / External_Skill_Source / Externally_Calculated / Effective_MomentInvalid date format for 'Effective_Moment'.The value supplied is not a valid xs:dateTime string.type=xs:dateTime (XSD date/time primitive)[COMMENT] Provide date in {'YYYY-MM-DD' if fmt == 'date' else 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'} format (ISO 8601). Example: 2024-06-15T09:00:00Z.

12 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursResolution / Fix
Worker_ReferenceWorker does not exist or is not accessible.The provided Worker WID does not correspond to an active worker.Verify the WID using Get_Workers before submitting talent data.
Effective_DateEffective Date is before the earliest allowed date.Effective_Date predates the worker's hire date.Use an Effective_Date on or after the worker's hire date.
Rating_ReferenceRating scale value does not exist for this review template.Rating WID references a value not defined in the performance review template.Match rating values to those configured in the performance review template.
Competency_ReferenceThe competency is not valid for this job profile.Competency referenced is not in the worker's job profile competency library.Use only competencies defined for the worker's job profile.
Business_Process_Parameters / CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment.Comment_Data submitted but BP Policy has comments disabled.Remove Comment_Data from the request, or enable comments in the Business Process Policy.
Business_Process_Parameters / Auto_CompleteThe Automatically Complete flag is not allowed by the business process policy.Auto_Complete=true but tenant BP Policy prohibits automatic completion.Set Auto_Complete=false, or update the Business Process Policy to allow auto-complete.
Business_Process_Parameters / Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard_On_Exit_Validation_Error is set to true but no validation errors are eligible.Flag is true for a BP that has no configured exit validations.Set Discard_On_Exit_Validation_Error=false, or configure exit validations in the BP.
WID / Reference IDInvalid ID value. The referenced object does not exist or is not accessible.Any WID or Reference ID in the payload points to a non-existent or inaccessible object.Validate all WIDs/Reference IDs via the corresponding Get operation before submitting.
Organization_ReferenceYou do not have security access to the organization.Integration System User's security group lacks access to the referenced organization.Add the required Organization Segment security group to the ISU's security profile.
Currency_ReferenceCurrency is required because an amount was entered.An Amount field is populated without a corresponding Currency_Reference.Always pair Currency_Reference with any monetary Amount field.
@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.
Business_Process_ParametersYou do not have permission to initiate the business process.ISU lacks the required domain security policy or business process security policy permission.Grant the ISU the required domain security policy (e.g., Initiate, Process).

Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation allows adding new awards and activities and editing existing awards and activities for a worker.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0

Manage_Education

Write Talent • v46.0 42 validations 4KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
42Validations
3Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation allows for adding and editing a worker's education. You may specify a School Reference or a School Name, Country, and Type. If the School Name and Country match one of the entries from the Schools report, the education record for that worker will use the School Reference. Otherwise, the School Name and Location will be text fields for the education for that worker.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: talentManagement v2, performanceEnablement v5.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.

Only one in progress event is allowed.Only one change can be in progress (the event in progress and not complete or canceled) for an education for a particular worker.Remove duplicates — only one "change" is allowed per request.API Docs

Manage_Publications

Write Talent • v46.0 140 validations 7KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
140Validations
1Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation allows adding new publications and editing existing awards for a worker.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: talentManagement v2, performanceEnablement v5.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
SOAP Request — Manage_Publications1 version-gated fields
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

ℹ Data Source  —  Field names are cross-verified against the Workday XSD schema (v30.0–v46.0). Error messages describe common SOAP API runtime behaviors.
12 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursResolution / Fix
Worker_ReferenceWorker does not exist or is not accessible.The provided Worker WID does not correspond to an active worker.Verify the WID using Get_Workers before submitting talent data.
Effective_DateEffective Date is before the earliest allowed date.Effective_Date predates the worker's hire date.Use an Effective_Date on or after the worker's hire date.
Rating_ReferenceRating scale value does not exist for this review template.Rating WID references a value not defined in the performance review template.Match rating values to those configured in the performance review template.
Competency_ReferenceThe competency is not valid for this job profile.Competency referenced is not in the worker's job profile competency library.Use only competencies defined for the worker's job profile.
Business_Process_Parameters / CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment.Comment_Data submitted but BP Policy has comments disabled.Remove Comment_Data from the request, or enable comments in the Business Process Policy.
Business_Process_Parameters / Auto_CompleteThe Automatically Complete flag is not allowed by the business process policy.Auto_Complete=true but tenant BP Policy prohibits automatic completion.Set Auto_Complete=false, or update the Business Process Policy to allow auto-complete.
Business_Process_Parameters / Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard_On_Exit_Validation_Error is set to true but no validation errors are eligible.Flag is true for a BP that has no configured exit validations.Set Discard_On_Exit_Validation_Error=false, or configure exit validations in the BP.
WID / Reference IDInvalid ID value. The referenced object does not exist or is not accessible.Any WID or Reference ID in the payload points to a non-existent or inaccessible object.Validate all WIDs/Reference IDs via the corresponding Get operation before submitting.
Organization_ReferenceYou do not have security access to the organization.Integration System User's security group lacks access to the referenced organization.Add the required Organization Segment security group to the ISU's security profile.
Currency_ReferenceCurrency is required because an amount was entered.An Amount field is populated without a corresponding Currency_Reference.Always pair Currency_Reference with any monetary Amount field.
@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.
Business_Process_ParametersYou do not have permission to initiate the business process.ISU lacks the required domain security policy or business process security policy permission.Grant the ISU the required domain security policy (e.g., Initiate, Process).
ℹ Data Source  —  Changelog entries are auto-generated from a recursive XSD type-tree diff across Workday API versions v30.0–v46.0. Each entry records the first version a field appeared in the schema.
VersionTypeDescription
v46.0ChangedRefer to Workday Community release notes for Manage_Relocation_Preferences version history.
v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.

NameYou either have a duplicate degree for one or more countries or you are trying to restrict a degree that is available for all countries and already in use. 12 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursResolution / Fix
Worker_ReferenceWorker does not exist or is not accessible.The provided Worker WID does not correspond to an active worker.Verify the WID using Get_Workers before submitting talent data.
Effective_DateEffective Date is before the earliest allowed date.Effective_Date predates the worker's hire date.Use an Effective_Date on or after the worker's hire date.
Rating_ReferenceRating scale value does not exist for this review template.Rating WID references a value not defined in the performance review template.Match rating values to those configured in the performance review template.
Competency_ReferenceThe competency is not valid for this job profile.Competency referenced is not in the worker's job profile competency library.Use only competencies defined for the worker's job profile.
Business_Process_Parameters / CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment.Comment_Data submitted but BP Policy has comments disabled.Remove Comment_Data from the request, or enable comments in the Business Process Policy.
Business_Process_Parameters / Auto_CompleteThe Automatically Complete flag is not allowed by the business process policy.Auto_Complete=true but tenant BP Policy prohibits automatic completion.Set Auto_Complete=false, or update the Business Process Policy to allow auto-complete.
Business_Process_Parameters / Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard_On_Exit_Validation_Error is set to true but no validation errors are eligible.Flag is true for a BP that has no configured exit validations.Set Discard_On_Exit_Validation_Error=false, or configure exit validations in the BP.
WID / Reference IDInvalid ID value. The referenced object does not exist or is not accessible.Any WID or Reference ID in the payload points to a non-existent or inaccessible object.Validate all WIDs/Reference IDs via the corresponding Get operation before submitting.
Organization_ReferenceYou do not have security access to the organization.Integration System User's security group lacks access to the referenced organization.Add the required Organization Segment security group to the ISU's security profile.
Currency_ReferenceCurrency is required because an amount was entered.An Amount field is populated without a corresponding Currency_Reference.Always pair Currency_Reference with any monetary Amount field.
@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.
Business_Process_ParametersYou do not have permission to initiate the business process.ISU lacks the required domain security policy or business process security policy permission.Grant the ISU the required domain security policy (e.g., Initiate, Process).

/mentorships[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}[talentManagement v2]GETGet all mentorships
/mentorships/{ID}/edit[talentManagement v2]POSTEdit the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForMe[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship for the current processing worker where the user is also the mentee.
/mentorships/{ID}/close[talentManagement v2]POSTCloses the mentorship.
/createMentorshipForWorker[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship between two workers.

ℹ Data Source  —  Field names are cross-verified against the Workday XSD schema (v30.0–v46.0). Error messages describe common SOAP API runtime behaviors.
12 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursResolution / Fix
Worker_ReferenceWorker does not exist or is not accessible.The provided Worker WID does not correspond to an active worker.Verify the WID using Get_Workers before submitting talent data.
Effective_DateEffective Date is before the earliest allowed date.Effective_Date predates the worker's hire date.Use an Effective_Date on or after the worker's hire date.
Rating_ReferenceRating scale value does not exist for this review template.Rating WID references a value not defined in the performance review template.Match rating values to those configured in the performance review template.
Competency_ReferenceThe competency is not valid for this job profile.Competency referenced is not in the worker's job profile competency library.Use only competencies defined for the worker's job profile.
Business_Process_Parameters / CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment.Comment_Data submitted but BP Policy has comments disabled.Remove Comment_Data from the request, or enable comments in the Business Process Policy.
Business_Process_Parameters / Auto_CompleteThe Automatically Complete flag is not allowed by the business process policy.Auto_Complete=true but tenant BP Policy prohibits automatic completion.Set Auto_Complete=false, or update the Business Process Policy to allow auto-complete.
Business_Process_Parameters / Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard_On_Exit_Validation_Error is set to true but no validation errors are eligible.Flag is true for a BP that has no configured exit validations.Set Discard_On_Exit_Validation_Error=false, or configure exit validations in the BP.
WID / Reference IDInvalid ID value. The referenced object does not exist or is not accessible.Any WID or Reference ID in the payload points to a non-existent or inaccessible object.Validate all WIDs/Reference IDs via the corresponding Get operation before submitting.
Organization_ReferenceYou do not have security access to the organization.Integration System User's security group lacks access to the referenced organization.Add the required Organization Segment security group to the ISU's security profile.
Currency_ReferenceCurrency is required because an amount was entered.An Amount field is populated without a corresponding Currency_Reference.Always pair Currency_Reference with any monetary Amount field.
@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.
Business_Process_ParametersYou do not have permission to initiate the business process.ISU lacks the required domain security policy or business process security policy permission.Grant the ISU the required domain security policy (e.g., Initiate, Process).

📖 Description

This operation allows adding new positions for succession.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

📖 Description

This operation updates the configuration of Talent Tags

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

Put_Work_Experience

Write Talent • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp

📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

Adds or updates a Work Experience with the information supplied in the request.

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Talent/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   performanceEnablement v5 talentManagement v2
/workers[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of workers and current staffing information.
/workers/{ID}[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of workers and current staffing information.
/workerGoalEvents[performanceEnablement v5]GETPOSTGet Worker Goal Events
/workers/{ID}/goals[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of goals for a specific worker.
/workerGoalEvents/{ID}[performanceEnablement v5]GETGet Worker Goal Events
/createMentorshipForWorker[talentManagement v2]POSTCreates a mentorship between two workers.
/workerGoalEvents/{ID}/goals[performanceEnablement v5]POSTCreates a single goal instance with the specified data.
/workerGoalEvents/{ID}/submit[performanceEnablement v5]POSTSubmits a worker goal event.
/workers/{ID}/developmentItems[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a collection of \~development items\~ for the specified \~worker\~.
/workers/{ID}/goals/{subresourceID}[performanceEnablement v5]GETRetrieves a single goal instance for a specific worker.
